SEARCH
Package com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.chunk

Class VirtualChunk

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.vf.api.chunk.VirtualChunk
public class VirtualChunk extends Object
Represents a chunk which holds Tiles

These chunks are used to decide when a Tile needs to be ticked.
Like a Bukkit Chunk, these chunks will load/unload based on player positions.
Tiles will only tick if the chunk is loaded.

      Tiles in this chunk

    • getTile

      public Tile<?> getTile(@NotNull @NotNull Block block)
      Get a Tile which is linked to a Block in this chunk
      Parameters:
      block - Block to check for Tile
      Returns:
      Tile which relates to a block, null if no tile exists

    • addTile

      public boolean addTile(@NotNull @NotNull Tile<?> tile)
      Add a Tile to this chunk

      NOTE: This should only be used internally.

      Parameters:
      tile - Tile to add
      Returns:
      True if tile was added successfully

    • removeTile

      public boolean removeTile(@NotNull @NotNull Tile<?> tile)
      Remove a Tile from this chunk

      NOTE: This should only be used internally.

      Parameters:
      tile - Tile to remove
      Returns:
      True if tile was successfully removed

    • isLoaded

      public boolean isLoaded()
      Check if this chunk is loaded
      Returns:
      True if loaded

    • isBukkitChunkLoaded

      public boolean isBukkitChunkLoaded()
      Check if the corresponding Bukkit Chunk is loaded
      Returns:
      True if loaded

    • getPluginChunkTickets

      public Collection<Plugin> getPluginChunkTickets()
      Retrieves a collection specifying which plugins have tickets for this chunk.

      A plugin ticket will prevent a chunk from unloading until it is explicitly removed. A plugin instance may only have one ticket per chunk, but each chunk can have multiple plugin tickets.

      Returns:
      Unmodifiable collection containing which plugins have tickets for this chunk

    • addPluginChunkTicket

      public boolean addPluginChunkTicket(@NotNull @NotNull Plugin plugin)
      Adds a plugin ticket for this chunk, loading this chunk if it is not already loaded.

      A plugin ticket will prevent a chunk from unloading until it is explicitly removed. A plugin instance may only have one ticket per chunk, but each chunk can have multiple plugin tickets.

      Parameters:
      plugin - Plugin which owns the ticket
      Returns:
      true if a plugin ticket was added, false if the ticket already exists for the plugin

    • removePluginChunkTicket

      public boolean removePluginChunkTicket(@NotNull @NotNull Plugin plugin)
      Removes the specified plugin's ticket for this chunk

      A plugin ticket will prevent a chunk from unloading until it is explicitly removed. A plugin instance may only have one ticket per chunk, but each chunk can have multiple plugin tickets.

      Parameters:
      plugin - Plugin which owns the ticket
      Returns:
      true if the plugin ticket was removed, false if there is no plugin ticket for the chunk

    • removeAllPluginChunkTickets

      public void removeAllPluginChunkTickets()
      Remove all plugin chunk tickets

      This is generally used internally and should not be used by plugins.

    • isForceLoaded

      public boolean isForceLoaded()
      Gets whether this chunk is force loaded

      A force loaded chunk will not unload due to player inactivity.

      Returns:
      True if chunk is force loaded, false if not

    • tick

      public void tick()
      Tick the chunk

      NOTE: This should only be used internally.
